summary: Found one concrete risk in the fix: the new terminal flush sends debounced steering via `turn/steer` after receiving `turn/completed`, but the Codex protocol treats `turn/steer` as requiring the currently active turn. That can still drop the queued follow-up the user was told was accepted.

actions.reason: ClawSweeper found an actionable commit-level bug/regression candidate.
